secondaryKeywords: SMB web hosting for service providers
seo.metaTitle: White-Label Website Hosting for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Deliver secure, scalable website hosting under your brand. Serve SMBs and agencies alike with Hostopia's white-label hosting platform — no infrastructure to build.

hero.headline: Enterprise-Grade Hosting Infrastructure — Sold Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: Some SMBs need more than a website builder. Agencies need multi-site management. Developers need configurable environments. Your hosting platform needs to serve them all.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label Website Hosting lets you deliver secure, scalable infrastructure under your brand — from simple managed hosting for SMBs to advanced multi-site environments for agencies and developers. No hosting stack to build or maintain.

items.title: Deploy beyond builders
items.body: Host WordPress, custom CMS sites, or any web application in a secure, managed environment.

items.title: Scale with confidence
items.body: Resource tiers grow with traffic and complexity — no surprise outages or forced migrations.

items.title: Manage multiple sites
items.body: Multi-site plans let agencies and developers manage client environments from a single dashboard.

items.title: Bundle everything
items.body: Domains, SSL, email, and ecommerce integrate directly — one platform, one brand, one bill.

vimeoOverview.title: Website Hosting built for partners and SMBs
vimeoOverview.description: A quick overview of how Hostopia hosting fits your white-label stack. Update the Vimeo ID in product JSON when your video is live.

features.heading: Hosting for Every Customer Segment — Under One Platform
features.intro: Tiered plans and flexible architecture mean you serve SMBs, WordPress users, developers, and agencies from the same white-label platform.

cards.title: Secure, Reliable Infrastructure
cards.body: Enterprise-grade data centers, high-availability architecture, and performance SLAs your customers can depend on.

cards.title: Multi-Site Management
cards.body: Purpose-built plans for agencies and developers managing multiple client websites — with virtualized environments, access controls, and usage visibility.

cards.title: CMS & Custom Site Support
cards.body: Host WordPress, Joomla, or custom-built sites. Full control over files, databases, and configurations for technically advanced customers.

cards.title: Integrated Digital Services
cards.body: Domains, SSL, business email, and ecommerce plug directly into the hosting experience. Your customers manage everything from one branded dashboard.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Own the Infrastructure Layer — Without Building It
partnerAdvantage.intro: Hosting anchors your SMB customers on your platform. The longer they host with you, the harder it is to leave.

items.title: Serve every maturity level
items.body: From first-time SMB website owners to agencies managing dozens of client sites — one hosting platform serves them all under your brand.

items.title: Drive recurring revenue through tiers and add-ons
items.body: Tiered hosting plans plus bundled domains, SSL, and email create multiple revenue streams from a single customer relationship.

items.title: Retain technical customers
items.body: Agencies and developers managing multi-site environments on your platform are deeply embedded — that's structural retention, not just contract retention.

items.title: Skip the infrastructure investment
items.body: Hostopia provides the data centers, tooling, and operations. You get a white-label platform with automated provisioning, SSO, and centralized management.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Infrastructure Foundation for Your Digital Portfolio
lifecycleFit.intro: Hosting sits alongside Website Builder and Website Design — ensuring you can serve every customer segment from first-time SMBs to advanced agencies.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Website Builder for DIY, Website Design for DIFM, Hosting for technical and agency customers.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive visibility.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce, email marketing, and custom development fuel growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position hosting as an upgrade path for advanced users, a foundation for ecommerce deployments, a natural attach with domains and SSL, and the core infrastructure service for agency and developer segments.

cta.headline: Ready to Deliver Enterprise-Grade Hosting Under Your Brand?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch white-label Website Hosting, serve every customer segment from SMBs to agencies, and anchor your digital services on infrastructure your customers depend on.
